## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (e.g. `feat(button): add scribbled variant`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavioral changes
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if any published package changed
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm format:check` pass locally
- [ ] No AI-attribution lines in commits or this PR description
